audit_findings.finding: android api() fetch no AbortController timeout, asymmetric with web/api.js d6f650b fix
audit_findings.remediation: Duplicate of existing SD-008. Add AbortController + 8s timeout to android api(), whitelist slow endpoints like /wiki/build.

audit_findings.finding: liveBus WebSocket no ping/pong heartbeat, NAT silent disconnect leaves status stuck 'on'
audit_findings.remediation: Add 30s client-side ping + 60s idle timeout; server pong handler. New SD-020.

audit_findings.finding: RELAY_TOKEN empty makes _check_token always return True, 403 path bypassed
audit_findings.remediation: main() startup: if host!=127.0.0.1 and not RELAY_TOKEN, refuse to start. Route-fix dispatch next round.

audit_findings.finding: _origin_ok returns True when Origin header absent, CSWSH protection ineffective for non-browser clients
audit_findings.remediation: Acceptable (token is primary defense). Optional: enforce Origin whitelist for /ws/tunnel only. SD-021.

audit_findings.finding: /ws/xiaozhi accepts WS handshake before token validation, unauthenticated connections consume resources
audit_findings.remediation: Refactor to validate token in middleware/validator before accept, fail with HTTP 403. SD-022.

audit_findings.finding: bootstrap 5s Promise.race timeout does not cancel in-flight fetches; losers continue mutating state
audit_findings.remediation: Deferred. Existing SD-019 covers same class. Each get already has 8s AbortController self-limiting.
